title: Grilled Australian Turkey Neck
description: A flavorful and tender turkey neck dish, marinated in a blend of Australian herbs and spices, then grilled to perfection. Serve with your favorite sides for a delicious and satisfying meal.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat (175°C).
Rinse the turkey neck and pat it dry with paper towels.
In a small bowl, mix together olive oil, chopped rosemary, chopped thyme, garlic powder, salt, and pepper.
Place the turkey neck in a large ziplock bag or a shallow dish. Pour the marinade over the turkey neck, turning to coat evenly.
Seal the bag or cover the dish with plastic wrap. Refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Remove the turkey neck from the marinade, letting any excess liquid drip off.
Place the turkey neck on the grill, bone side down. Close the grill lid and cook for 5 minutes.
Flip the turkey neck over and cook for an additional 5-7 minutes, or until the internal temperature reaches 74°C.
Remove the turkey neck from the grill and let it rest for 5 minutes before slicing.
Serve the grilled turkey neck hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
